home.headline: Find jobs faster with AI
home.subheadline: Job SB analyzes your CV, finds the best offers and adapts your CV for each application — automatically.
home.step1Desc: Upload your CV in PDF or Word. The AI analyzes your profile and suggests target roles.
home.step2Desc: The system scrapes LinkedIn and Indeed and scores each offer against your real profile.
home.step3Desc: For high-score offers, generate a tailored CV in one click. Download it and apply.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: In 5 minutes you'll have your automated job search configured. Here's what we'll do:
onboarding.welcomeBullet1: We analyze your CV and identify the roles you're qualified for
onboarding.welcomeBullet2: We search the best offers on LinkedIn and Indeed
onboarding.welcomeBullet3: We score each offer against your real profile
onboarding.uploadDrag: Drag the file here or click to select
onboarding.rolesDesc: I identified these roles from your CV. You can add more or remove ones that don't interest you.
onboarding.paramsDesc: All fields are optional. You can change them at any time.
onboarding.readyDesc: Your search is configured. Click to start the first run.

dashboard.title: Your offers
dashboard.noResults: No offers found. Start a run to begin.
dashboard.limitWarning: You've used 80% of your monthly runs.
dashboard.limitReached: You've reached your monthly limit. Upgrade your plan to continue.
dashboard.cv_warning: Always review your CV before sending

trial.found: We found your first compatible offer!
trial.upgradeDesc: Subscribe to see all offers and generate unlimited adapted CVs.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.professionalDesc: For those who want the best from their applications

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.limitReached: Monthly limit reached. Upgrade your plan to continue.
